name: compliance auto-refresh: framework with fetch_frequency:monthly fetched 5 days ago is not refreshed (cadence respected)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && echo "2026-05-08T00:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/monthly-x.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/auto-refresh-daily.sh" --now 2026-05-13T08:00:00Z --upstream-stub "$PWD/upstream.sh" --report 2>out.txt && ! grep "monthly-x refreshed" out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
